title: Build the Incident Timeline
description:
Using only the artefacts in /evidence/ from Task 1, write a single-paragraph incident timeline suitable for the board. Each sentence must cite the artefact it came from (filename + line or timestamp). No sentence may contain jargon a non-technical board member would not understand.

Required coverage — your timeline must name, in order:

  1. The moment of initial access (time, method, source IP).
  2. The reconnaissance step that revealed the path to privilege.
  3. The sudoers abuse that enabled escalation — in one sentence, in plain language.
  4. The persistence mechanism and the user account it piggybacks on.
  5. The first C2 callback (time, destination, content of the beacon).

Scoring: jargon in the final paragraph loses 2 pts per word. Missing citations lose 5 pts per step. A timeline that is internally inconsistent with the evidence loses 15 pts.

The chair reads the first and last sentence only — make them count.

widgetConfig.placeholder: On [time] UTC, an authorised-looking SSH login from [IP] opened a session on [host]…
